case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS ROBINETTE CLINTON

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $351.05 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT ROBINETTE CLINTON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-12-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROBINETTE CLINTON $351.05 PRINCIPAL, $19.29 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $370.34 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGEMENT TO DEF.RETURNED. FORWARDING ORDER EXPIRED.
